Script.name: ORT_init
Script.script:
--[[ ObjectRegistryTemplate ====================== Base class for registries that track in-game objects (items, herbs, …). Required config fields when calling :new{}: config.prefix – short alias prefix, e.g. "EQ" or "KR" config.name – human-readable name shown in messages Optional config fields: config.extra_fields – table of {field_name = default_value} for subclass-specific fields beyond the common set. Example: {typ="", stats=""} for EquipmentRegistry. Common object fields stored per entry: _id – unique integer ID (auto-assigned) name – item name ort – location / place region – region / domain magier – creator wizard name para – parallel world index (0 = normal world) hinweise – list of strings (remarks / hints) + any extra_fields defined by the subclass Aliases created automatically (using config.prefix): #

add |||| #

sadd (quick add using gmcp location) #

del #

find #

finde :(&:)* #

list : #

(show single entry) #

note (add/edit/delete remark) #

change : (change a field) ]]-- ObjectRegistryTemplate = ObjectRegistryTemplate or MundronClassMethods:extend{ _name = "ObjectRegistryTemplate", _module = "ObjectRegistry", _version = "1.0.0", files = { game = { objects = {} } }, _fixed_version = { MundronClassMethods = "1.1.0" } } -- ---------------------------------------------------------------- -- Constructor -- ---------------------------------------------------------------- function ObjectRegistryTemplate:new(spec) assert(table.get(spec, { "config", "prefix" }), f"ObjectRegistryTemplate: missing config.prefix in {spec._name}") assert(table.get(spec, { "config", "name" }), f"ObjectRegistryTemplate: missing config.name in {spec._name}") -- Merge file defaults so subclass does not have to repeat them spec.files = spec.files or {} spec.files.game = spec.files.game or {} if spec.files.game.objects == nil then spec.files.game.objects = {} end -- Mark data_on_demand so loading happens lazily table.set(spec, "config.data_on_demand", true) local obj = MundronClassMethods.new(self, spec) obj:_create_aliases() return obj end -- ---------------------------------------------------------------- -- post_load_data – rebuild lookup maps after every load -- ---------------------------------------------------------------- function ObjectRegistryTemplate:post_load_data() local by_id = {} local max_id = 0 for _, entry in ipairs(self.data.objects) do by_id[entry._id] = entry if entry._id > max_id then max_id = entry._id end end self.data._by_id = by_id self.data._max_id = max_id self:info(f"{len(self.data.objects)} {self.config.name}-Eintraege geladen.") end

Script.name: ORT_aliases
Script.script:
-- ---------------------------------------------------------------- -- Alias auto-creation (mirrors HintRegistryTemplate pattern) -- ---------------------------------------------------------------- function ObjectRegistryTemplate:_alias_group_name() return f"ORT_{self._name}" end function ObjectRegistryTemplate:_create_aliases() local p = self.config.prefix -- e.g. "EQ" local n = self._name -- e.g. "EquipmentRegistry" local group = self:_alias_group_name() if exists(group, "alias") == 0 then self:info(f"Erstelle Alias-Gruppe {group}") permGroup(group, "alias", self._module) end -- helper: only create alias when not yet present in this group local function mk(aname, regex, script_body) local known = false for _, aid in pairs(findItems(aname, "alias")) do known = ancestors(aid, "alias")[1].name == group if known then break end end if not known then permAlias(aname, group, f(regex), f(script_body)) end end -- #

add |||| mk(f"#{p}add", f"^#{p}add ([^|]+)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)|([0-9]?)$", [[ ---@pattern #{p}add |||| ---@desc Fuegt einen neuen {self.config.name}-Eintrag hinzu. ---@desc Para: 0 = Normalwelt (Standard), sonst Parallelweltnummer. {n}:add(matches[2], matches[3], matches[4], matches[5], tonumber(matches[6]) or 0) ]]) -- #

sadd (quick-add with gmcp location) mk(f"#{p}sadd", f"^#{p}sadd (.+)$", [[ ---@pattern #{p}sadd ---@desc Fuegt den Eintrag schnell hinzu; Ort und Region kommen aus GMCP. {n}:add( matches[2], gmcp.MG.room.info.short, gmcp.MG.room.info.domain, nil, PLAYER.world() ) ]]) -- #

del mk(f"#{p}del", f"^#{p}del (\\d+)$", [[ ---@pattern #{p}del ---@desc Loescht den Eintrag mit der angegebenen ID (Sicherheitsabfrage). {n}:delete(tonumber(matches[2])) ]]) -- #

find mk(f"#{p}find", f"^#{p}find (\\w+)$", [[ ---@pattern #{p}find ---@desc Zeigt alle Eintraege, deren Name die Eingabe enthaelt. {n}:find_by_prop({{name=matches[2]}}) ]]) -- #

finde :(&:)* mk(f"#{p}finde", f"^#{p}finde (\\w+:\\w+(\\&\\w+:\\w+)*)$", [[ ---@pattern #{p}finde :(&:)* ---@desc Komplexe Suche ueber mehrere Felder (alle Kriterien muessen zutreffen). local prop = {{}} for _, pat in pairs(matches[2]:split("&")) do local field, value = unpack(pat:split(":")) prop[field:lower()] = value end {n}:find_by_prop(prop) ]]) -- #

list : mk(f"#{p}list", f"^#{p}list (\\w+):(.*)$", [[ ---@pattern #{p}list : ---@desc Listet alle vorhandenen Werte fuer das Feld auf (optional gefiltert). {n}:find_attr(matches[2], matches[3]) ]]) -- #

(show single) mk(f"#{p}", f"^#{p} (\\d+)$", [[ ---@pattern #{p} ---@desc Zeigt alle Details zum Eintrag mit dieser ID. {n}:show(tonumber(matches[2])) ]]) -- #

note mk(f"#{p}note", f"^#{p}note (\\d+) (\\d+)(\\s(.*))?$", [[ ---@pattern #{p}note ---@desc Fuegt einen Hinweis hinzu, ersetzt oder loescht ihn (leerer Text = loeschen). {n}:edit_remark(tonumber(matches[2]), tonumber(matches[3]), matches[5]) ]]) -- #

change : mk(f"#{p}change", f"^#{p}change (\\d+) (\\w+):(.*)$", [[ ---@pattern #{p}change : ---@desc Aendert ein einzelnes Feld des Eintrags (Sicherheitsabfrage). {n}:change(tonumber(matches[2]), matches[3], matches[4]) ]]) end

Script.name: ORT_crud
Script.script:
-- ================================================================ -- CRUD helpers -- ================================================================
-- ---------------------------------------------------------------- -- :add – create a new entry -- ---------------------------------------------------------------- function ObjectRegistryTemplate:add(name, ort, region, magier, para, extra) if not name or len(name) == 0 then self:warn("Ein Eintrag benoetigt wenigstens einen Namen.") return end if not self.data then self:demand_data() end
local new_id = (self.data._max_id or 0) + 1
local doc = { _id = new_id, name = name, ort = ort or "", region = region or "", magier = magier or "", para = para or 0, hinweise = {}, }
-- Merge subclass-specific extra fields local defaults = table.get(self, "config.extra_fields") or {} for field, default in pairs(defaults) do doc[field] = (extra and extra[field]) or default end
table.insert(self.data.objects, doc) self.data._by_id[new_id] = doc self.data._max_id = new_id
self:save_game() iprint({ { f"Neuer {self.config.name}-Eintrag:", "y" } }, self._shortname or self._name) self:_print_entry(new_id, doc) end
-- ---------------------------------------------------------------- -- :delete – two-step confirmation -- ---------------------------------------------------------------- function ObjectRegistryTemplate:delete(id) if not self.data then self:demand_data() end local entry = self.data._by_id[id] if not entry then self:warn(f"Kein Eintrag mit der ID {id} gefunden.") return end
if self.state.del_flag and self.state.del_flag.id == id then -- confirmed for i, e in ipairs(self.data.objects) do if e._id == id then table.remove(self.data.objects, i) break end end self.data._by_id[id] = nil self.state.del_flag = nil self:save_game() self:info(f"Eintrag {id} wurde geloescht.") else self:info("Willst du wirklich folgenden Eintrag loeschen? Befehl wiederholen zum Bestaetigen:") self:_print_entry(id, entry) self.state.del_flag = { id = id } end end
-- ---------------------------------------------------------------- -- :change – two-step confirmation for field edit -- ---------------------------------------------------------------- function ObjectRegistryTemplate:change(id, field, value) if not self.data then self:demand_data() end field = string.lower(field) local entry = self.data._by_id[id] if not entry then self:warn(f"Kein Eintrag mit der ID {id} gefunden.") return end
-- para must stay numeric if field == "para" then local n = tonumber(value) if not n or n < 0 then self:warn("Para muss eine ganze Zahl >= 0 sein.") return end value = n end
if self.state.change_flag and self.state.change_flag.id == id and self.state.change_flag.field == field then entry[field] = self.state.change_flag.value self.state.change_flag = nil self:save_game() self:info({ "Feld ", { string.title(field), "ly" }, " wurde geaendert." }) self:_print_entry(id, entry) else self:info(f"Willst du bei Eintrag {id} das Feld '{field}' auf '{value}' setzen? Befehl wiederholen:") self:_print_entry(id, entry) self.state.change_flag = { id = id, field = field, value = value } end end
-- ---------------------------------------------------------------- -- :edit_remark – add / replace / delete a remark (hinweis) -- ---------------------------------------------------------------- function ObjectRegistryTemplate:edit_remark(id, pos, text) if not self.data then self:demand_data() end local entry = self.data._by_id[id] if not entry then self:warn(f"Kein Eintrag mit der ID {id} gefunden.") return end
local hints = entry.hinweise if not text or len(text) == 0 then -- delete if pos > len(hints) then self:warn(f"Keine Anmerkung an Position {pos}.") return end local removed = table.remove(hints, pos) self:info(f"Anmerkung '{removed}' an Position {pos} geloescht.") elseif pos > len(hints) then -- append table.insert(hints, text) self:info(f"Neue Anmerkung hinzugefuegt: '{text}'") else -- replace hints[pos] = text self:info(f"Anmerkung {pos} ersetzt durch: '{text}'") end self:save_game() end

Script.name: ORT_search
Script.script:
-- ================================================================ -- Search / display helpers -- ================================================================
-- ---------------------------------------------------------------- -- :show – show a single entry by ID -- ---------------------------------------------------------------- function ObjectRegistryTemplate:show(id) if not self.data then self:demand_data() end local entry = self.data._by_id[id] if not entry then self:warn(f"Kein Eintrag mit der ID {id} gefunden.") return end self:_print_entry(id, entry) end
-- ---------------------------------------------------------------- -- :find_by_prop – multi-field substring search, returns matches -- ---------------------------------------------------------------- function ObjectRegistryTemplate:find_by_prop(pattern_dict) if not self.data then self:demand_data() end local hits = {} for _, entry in ipairs(self.data.objects) do local ok = true for attr, value in pairs(pattern_dict) do local ev = entry[attr] if not ev or not substring(string.lower(tostring(ev)), string.lower(value)) then ok = false break end end if ok then table.insert(hits, entry) end end if len(hits) == 0 then self:warn("Keine Eintraege gefunden.") else self:info(f"{len(hits)} Eintrag/Eintraege gefunden:") self:_print_list(hits) end return hits end
-- ---------------------------------------------------------------- -- :find_attr – list all distinct values for a field -- ---------------------------------------------------------------- function ObjectRegistryTemplate:find_attr(attr, sub) if not self.data then self:demand_data() end local _attr = string.lower(attr) local _sub = string.lower(sub or "") local seen = {} for _, entry in ipairs(self.data.objects) do local v = entry[_attr] if v and substring(string.lower(tostring(v)), _sub) then seen[tostring(v)] = true end end local vals = table.keys(seen) table.sort(vals) if len(vals) == 0 then self:info(f"Keine Werte fuer '{attr}' gefunden.") else self:info({ "Werte fuer", { f"'{attr}'", "ly" }, ":" }) local tab = {} for i, v in ipairs(vals) do table.insert(tab, { { f"{i}:", "lg" }, v }) end print_table(tab) end end
-- ---------------------------------------------------------------- -- :_print_entry – detailed single-entry display -- ---------------------------------------------------------------- function ObjectRegistryTemplate:_print_entry(id, entry) local world = tonumber(entry.para) or 0 local tab = { { { "Nr:", "ly" }, tostring(id) }, { { "Name:", "ly" }, entry.name or "" }, { { f"Ort ({world}):", world > 0 and "ly" or "lg" }, entry.ort or "" }, { { "Region:", "ly" }, entry.region or "" }, { { "Magier:", "ly" }, entry.magier or "" }, { { "Para:", "ly" }, tostring(world) }, }
-- subclass-specific extra fields local extras = table.get(self, "config.extra_fields") or {} for field, _ in pairs(extras) do table.insert(tab, { { f"{string.title(field)}:", "ly" }, tostring(entry[field] or "") }) end
-- remarks local hints = entry.hinweise or {} if len(hints) == 0 then table.insert(tab, { { "Anmerkungen:", "ly" }, "<keine>" }) else for i, h in ipairs(hints) do local lines = break_lines(h) table.insert(tab, { { f"Anmerkung ({i}/{len(hints)}):", "y" }, lines[1] }) for j = 2, len(lines) do table.insert(tab, { "", lines[j] }) end end end
echo("\n") print_table(tab, -1) end
-- ---------------------------------------------------------------- -- :_print_list – compact multi-entry list -- ---------------------------------------------------------------- function ObjectRegistryTemplate:_print_list(entries) local tab = {} for _, entry in ipairs(entries) do local world = tonumber(entry.para) or 0 local id_col = world > 0 and { f"[{entry._id}]", "ly" } or { f"[{entry._id}]", "lg" } table.insert(tab, { id_col, (entry.name or ""):sub(1, 30), { f"Ort({world}):", world > 0 and "ly" or "lg" }, (entry.ort or ""):sub(1, 30), }) end echo("\n") print_table(tab, { 1, -1, -1, -1 }, 1) end
-- ---------------------------------------------------------------- -- Migration stub (subclasses override as needed) -- ---------------------------------------------------------------- function ObjectRegistryTemplate:migrate_game(saved_version) if self.version_lt(saved_version, "1.0.0") then MundronClassMethods.migrate_game(self) saved_version = "1.0.0" end return saved_version end

Script.name: ER_init
Script.script:
--[[ EquipmentRegistry ================= Tracks wearable / usable equipment (weapons, armor, rings, …).
Extra fields beyond the common set: typ – item type, e.g. "Waffe", "Ruestung", "Ring", "Amulett" … stats – free-text stats description, e.g. "+5 KK, scharf"
Alias prefix: EQ Short name: EQ
Usage examples: #EQadd Zauberstab des Feuers|Lavakammer|Vulkan|Ignar|0 #EQchange 3 typ:Waffe #EQnote 3 1 Nur in der Parallelwelt verfuegbar #EQfind stab #EQfinde typ:Waffe&region:Vulkan #EQlist typ: #EQ 3 ]]--
EquipmentRegistry = EquipmentRegistry or ObjectRegistryTemplate:new{ _name = "EquipmentRegistry", _shortname = "EQ", _module = "ObjectRegistry", _version = "1.0.0", config = { prefix = "EQ", name = "Ausruestung", extra_fields = { typ = "", -- item category stats = "", -- stat summary }, }, _fixed_version = { MundronClassMethods = "1.1.0", ObjectRegistryTemplate = "1.0.0", } }
-- Convenience: add with typ and stats supplied inline -- #EQfull <Name>|<Ort>|<Region>|<Magier>|<Para>|<Typ>|<Stats> -- (This alias is created here manually because it has extra params.) do local group = EquipmentRegistry:_alias_group_name() if exists(group, "alias") > 0 then local found = false for _, aid in pairs(findItems("#EQfull", "alias")) do if ancestors(aid, "alias")[1].name == group then found = true; break end end if not found then permAlias( "#EQfull", group, "^#EQfull ([^|]+)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)|([0-9]?)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)$", [[ ---@pattern #EQfull <Name>|<Ort>|<Region>|<Magier>|<Para>|<Typ>|<Stats> ---@desc Vollstaendige Eingabe inkl. Typ und Stats. EquipmentRegistry:add( matches[2], matches[3], matches[4], matches[5], tonumber(matches[6]) or 0, {typ=matches[7], stats=matches[8]} ) ]] ) end end end
function EquipmentRegistry:migrate_game(saved_version) if self.version_lt(saved_version, "1.0.0") then MundronClassMethods.migrate_game(self) saved_version = "1.0.0" end return saved_version end

Script.name: HR_init
Script.script:
--[[ HerbRegistry ============ Tracks herbs / plants and their locations.
Extra fields beyond the common set: saison – season(s) when the herb can be found, e.g. "Fruehling, Sommer" zubereitung – how to prepare / use, e.g. "trocken, kochen"
Alias prefix: KR (Kraeuterkunde-Register) Short name: KR
Usage examples: #KRadd Feuerblume|Lavakammer|Vulkan|Ignar|0 #KRchange 2 saison:Sommer #KRnote 2 1 Nur nach dem Regen sichtbar #KRfind blume #KRfinde saison:Sommer #KRlist zubereitung: #KR 2 ]]--
HerbRegistry = HerbRegistry or ObjectRegistryTemplate:new{ _name = "HerbRegistry", _shortname = "KR", _module = "ObjectRegistry", _version = "1.0.0", config = { prefix = "KR", name = "Kraeuter", extra_fields = { saison = "", -- season availability zubereitung = "", -- preparation / use instructions }, }, _fixed_version = { MundronClassMethods = "1.1.0", ObjectRegistryTemplate = "1.0.0", } }
-- Convenience alias with extra herb fields: -- #KRfull <Name>|<Ort>|<Region>|<Magier>|<Para>|<Saison>|<Zubereitung> do local group = HerbRegistry:_alias_group_name() if exists(group, "alias") > 0 then local found = false for _, aid in pairs(findItems("#KRfull", "alias")) do if ancestors(aid, "alias")[1].name == group then found = true; break end end if not found then permAlias( "#KRfull", group, "^#KRfull ([^|]+)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)|([0-9]?)|([^|]*)|([^|]*)$", [[ ---@pattern #KRfull <Name>|<Ort>|<Region>|<Magier>|<Para>|<Saison>|<Zubereitung> ---@desc Vollstaendige Eingabe inkl. Saison und Zubereitung. HerbRegistry:add( matches[2], matches[3], matches[4], matches[5], tonumber(matches[6]) or 0, {saison=matches[7], zubereitung=matches[8]} ) ]] ) end end end
function HerbRegistry:migrate_game(saved_version) if self.version_lt(saved_version, "1.0.0") then MundronClassMethods.migrate_game(self) saved_version = "1.0.0" end return saved_version end
